name: Cinnamon French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beaten egg, milk, vanilla extract, and ground cinnamon in a flat dish.
2. Add one slice of bread at a time, turning to coat both sides and absorb some liquid.
3. Remove the bread slices one by one onto a plate.
4. Heat butter or oil on a large griddle or skillet over medium heat.
5. Brown each slice of bread briefly on each side until golden.
6. Serve with syrup, honey, cooked or raw fruit, or plain.
